title: Le reel attrape par l'imaginaire: Philip Dick et la science-fonctionnalisation de la realite
author: Richard Saint-Gelais
card_summary: A French-language scholarly article from Etudes litteraires (Vol. 30, No. 1, April 2005) examining how Dick's fiction captures and transforms reality through the imaginary. Saint-Gelais explores the concept of 'science-functionalization' of reality in Dick's work. Part of the strong Francophone tradition of Dick scholarship. 15 pages.
